info.name: Fix My City
info.description:
Complete API collection for Fix My City - City Issue Reporting & Management System

ROLES:
- CITIZEN: Can create issues, view their own issues
- AUTHORITY: Can view assigned issues, update issue status, manage their profile
- ADMIN: Can CRUD organizations/authorities only

request.description:
Register a new citizen account.

**Body Fields:**
- `email` (string, required): Valid email address
- `password` (string, required): Min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, special char
- `full_name` (string, required): 2-255 characters
- `phone` (string, optional): Valid phone number format

Authenticate user and receive JWT token.

**Body Fields:**
- `email` (string, required): User's email address
- `password` (string, required): User's password

**Response:** Returns user object and JWT token. Token is automatically saved to collection variables.

Login as Admin (can only CRUD organizations).

**Default Admin Credentials:**
- Email: admin@fixmycity.com
- Password: Admin@123456

Login as Authority (organization). Can manage assigned issues and profile.

**Sample Authority Credentials:**
- Email: electricity@city.gov
- Password: Electricity@123

Logout current user and destroy session.

**Body Fields:** None required

Get current user's profile information.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token)

**Body Fields:** None (GET request)

Update current user's profile information.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token)

**Body Fields:**
- `full_name` (string, optional): 2-255 characters
- `phone` (string, optional): Valid phone number format

Change current user's password.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token)

**Body Fields:**
- `current_password` (string, required): Current password
- `new_password` (string, required): Min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, special char

formdata.value: Broken street light on Main Street
The street light at the corner of Main St and 5th Ave has been broken for 3 days. It's very dark at night and poses a safety hazard.

request.description:
Create a new issue report with image upload using multipart/form-data.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, CITIZEN role only)

**Body Fields (form-data):**
- `title` (text, required): 5-255 characters
- `description` (text, required): 10-5000 characters
- `organization_id` (text, required): ID of the responsible authority
- `latitude` (text, optional): GPS latitude (-90 to 90)
- `longitude` (text, optional): GPS longitude (-180 to 180)
- `image` (file, optional): Image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP - max 5MB)

**Duplicate Detection:**
If a similar issue exists, returns the existing issue instead.

formdata.value: Water pipe leak on Oak Avenue
There is a significant water leak from the main pipe on Oak Avenue near the elementary school.

request.description:
Create a new issue with only required fields (no image).

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, CITIZEN role only)

**Body Fields (form-data - minimal):**
- `title` (text, required): 5-255 characters
- `description` (text, required): 10-5000 characters
- `organization_id` (text, required): ID of the responsible authority

Get all issues created by the current user.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, CITIZEN role only)

**Body Fields:** None (GET request)

Get detailed information about a specific issue.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token)
- Citizens can only view their own issues
- Authorities can view issues assigned to them
- Admins can view all issues

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Issue ID

Get all issues assigned to the authority (organization).

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, AUTHORITY role only)

**Body Fields:** None (GET request)

query.description: Filter by status: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, or RESOLVED

request.description:
Get issues filtered by status.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, AUTHORITY role only)

**Query Parameters:**
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, or RESOLVED

item.name: Update Issue Status - To In Progress

request.description:
Update issue status to IN_PROGRESS.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, AUTHORITY role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Issue ID

**Body Fields:**
- `status` (string, required): Must be "IN_PROGRESS"

**Note:** Status can only move forward (PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → RESOLVED)

Update issue status to RESOLVED.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, AUTHORITY role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Issue ID

**Body Fields:**
- `status` (string, required): Must be "RESOLVED"

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Sanitation Department",
    "description": "Handles garbage collection, waste management, and city cleanliness.",
    "category": "Sanitation",
    "contact_email": "sanitation@city.gov",
    "contact_phone": "+1234567893",
    "email": "sanitation@city.gov",
    "password": "Sanitation@123"
}

request.description:
Create a new authority (organization) with linked user account.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**Body Fields:**
- `name` (string, required): 2-255 characters, organization name
- `description` (string, optional): Max 5000 characters
- `category` (string, required): 2-100 characters (e.g., Electricity, Water, Roads)
- `contact_email` (string, required): Valid email for public contact
- `contact_phone` (string, optional): Valid phone number
- `email` (string, required): Login email for authority account
- `password` (string, required): Min 8 chars with uppercase, lowercase, number, special char

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Electricity & Power Department",
    "description": "Updated description for the department.",
    "category": "Electricity",
    "contact_email": "power@city.gov",
    "contact_phone": "+1987654321"
}

request.description:
Update authority (organization) details.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Organization ID

**Body Fields (all optional):**
- `name` (string): 2-255 characters
- `description` (string): Max 5000 characters
- `category` (string): 2-100 characters
- `contact_email` (string): Valid email
- `contact_phone` (string): Valid phone number

Activate an authority (organization) and its user account.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Organization ID

Deactivate an authority (organization) and its user account.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Organization ID

Get list of all authorities (organizations).

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

Get list of active authorities only.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**Query Parameters:**
- `active` (boolean, optional): Set to 'true' for active only

Get detailed information about a specific authority.

**Authorization:** Required (Bearer token, ADMIN role only)

**URL Parameters:**
- `id` (integer): Organization ID

Get list of active authorities (organizations) for citizens to select when creating issues.

**Authorization:** None required (public endpoint)

**Returns:** id, name, description, category, contact_email, contact_phone

Check if the API server is running.

**Authorization:** None required
